name: HowTo-Genie v4.0 — A/B Testing & Optimization Engine

nodes.name: 🧪 A/B Test Setup (Daily 6AM)
nodes.notes: Creates test variants for yesterday's published post.

nodes.name: 💉 Inject A/B Test Code
nodes.notes: Generates JavaScript to dynamically serve variants and track results.

nodes.name: 📈 Test Results Check (Daily 6PM)
nodes.notes: Checks test results every 24 hours to determine winners.

nodes.name: 📊 Fetch Test Results
nodes.notes: Custom WordPress endpoint that aggregates test metrics from database.

nodes.name: 🔍 AI: Identify Optimization Patterns
nodes.notes: Runs monthly to extract learnings from all tests.

nodes.name: 📚 Update Optimization Playbook
nodes.notes: Builds a knowledge base of what works for our audience.
